class.description: Additional class merged onto the `.cinder-grid-list__item` root element.

href.description: Destination URL. When set, the `title` snippet is rendered as a stretched `<a>` anchor covering the entire tile.

rel.description: `rel` attribute forwarded to the stretched-link anchor; `noopener noreferrer` is merged automatically when `target="_blank"`.

unsupportedProps.name: actions
unsupportedProps.description:
Action buttons. This wrapper is lifted above the stretched-link overlay
via `position: relative; z-index: 1` so buttons remain clickable.

unsupportedProps.name: target
unsupportedProps.description:
When `target` matches `"_blank"` (case-insensitive), the component
automatically composes `rel="noopener noreferrer"` with any
consumer-supplied `rel` tokens to prevent reverse-tabnapping.

unsupportedProps.name: title
unsupportedProps.description: Primary label. Provides the accessible name for the stretched link when `href` is set.
